call_inputs.name: registration_data
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing patient details (name, contact, etc.)

call_outputs.name: registration_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check for uniqueness and create new patient record

call_inputs.name: booking_data
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing patient ID, date, time, doctor, etc.

call_outputs.name: booking_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Check slot availability and create new appointment

call_outputs.name: records_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status, list of records, and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Retrieve all records for the patient

call_inputs.name: update_data
call_inputs.description: JSON object containing patient ID and fields to update

call_outputs.name: update_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with success status and message

internal_leaf_accesses.description: Verify patient exists and update profile fields

call_outputs.name: parsed_data
call_outputs.description: Remaining JSON data for the command

call_outputs.name: validation_result
call_outputs.description: JSON with valid boolean and optional error message

call_inputs.name: operation_result
call_inputs.description: Result from a child operation (success, data, message)
call_inputs.source: output from one of the functional children

call_outputs.name: formatted_output
call_outputs.description: JSON with success, data, message fields
